svg.aria-label: Project graph: engram (private) and crebain connect through the always-on, two-way NCP protocol to prisoma, a private hub; pid-rs, cobot-atlas, melkor and relief-atlas connect to prisoma; cobot-atlas, melkor and relief-atlas also connect to crebain; cortexel connects to engram.
svg.text: THE SYSTEM // HOW THE WORK CONNECTS
